programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: D-Structs kidnaps Revvit to show the crew who's boss when they compete over construction, so Ty plans the perfect heist to rescue their friend.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: The PALs join AI and Javier on a mustang drive, but when Javier gets injured, it’s up to Lucky and Spirit to get him to safety

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: When Krupp transfers to another school, George and Harold follow, only to find a bizarro version of Jerome Horwitz Elementary, where the teachers are nice and the kids are well-behaved. But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town. He loses his title as Dragon Master and teams up with Wandering Blade, a knight on a mission from England, to track down the weasels and get his title back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: After Mega Fat is fired from Baby Corp;he’s forced on the path of recovery towards being a Good Baby. However;Mega Fat is more interested in getting revenge on Boss Baby than finding the perfect family to adopt him.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: Boss Baby uses the cover of Halloween Night to sneak into Bubeezee’s Headquarters to shut it all down. Tim covers for Boss by distracting Marisol with a night of trick or treating.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: A brainwashed Boss Baby breaks free from overly sanitized Bubbeezee products. He rallies the Playgroup Babies to run the company out of business by breaking every product in town.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Despite being terrible at the job, Krupp wants to be the camp director again next summer. That's something Harold and George simply cannot abide.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 38

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 39

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4

Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 18

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: Beneath the earth, and hidden in the depths of the sea, lie some of the deadliest discoveries of all time. From an asteroid impact that nearly ended life on Earth to creatures once thought to be myths.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: The world is full of strange and mind-bending places, but some take the cake. Explore an island ruled by deadly predators or a mysterious paranormal hotspot that's a magnet for UFOs and strange sightings.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: When Motorola introduces the first handheld portable telephone to the world, the futuristic technology sets off a fierce battle among telecommunications companies to produce the most popular cell phone.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18) - EP 321
programme.desc: In Texas, Retro Rick opens the doors to his stockpile of Hollywood relics, and Robbie is determined to reunite two halves of an ultra-rare gas globe.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14) - EP 3
programme.desc: When Lia was ten, she became intrigued by her mother's many collectibles and started going to antique stores and estate sales with her and is where Lia suspects her hoarding compulsion originates.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: When a beloved Florida teacher is found beaten to death on a neighbour’s lawn, a blood trail leads detectives to her partner-and exposes a violent history fuelled by jealousy.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception - EP 3
programme.desc: Edward Ates takes a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo in a bid to show his innocence. He spent 20 years behind bars for the murder of his neighbour-a crime he says he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 6
programme.desc: What begins as an open-and-shut case spins into a full-on investigation when a mother and son are found dead in their home. Was this a murder/suicide, or could someone else have been responsible?

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 512

programme.title: Giving Hope: The Ni'Cola Mitchell Story

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5) - EP 71

programme.title: Rob Peace
programme.desc: The true story of Robert Peace who grew up in New Jersey, the son of a convicted murderer, and defied the odds and went to Yale on a full scholarship. But at age 30, his bright future was ended by the bullet of a rival gang dealer.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: The quest for perfection drives two magicians to the very edge of sanity and morality.

programme.desc: Grindelwald escapes custody and Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander, who agrees to help, unaware of the dangers that lie ahead.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 2
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold's last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold's friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station.

programme.desc: While trying to film his own indie film, Ben accidentally lets the Bug Gang go free and when he takes the fight to their hidden lair, Ben has to take on their narcissistic leader - the Ant Queen.

programme.desc: Ben interferes with malicious magician Hex's quest for the Titan Gloves at a flea market and accidentally switches bodies with Gwen, forcing him to walk a mile in her shoes and vice-versa!

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: During a tour of historic Oldeville, Ben finds a rare Sumo Slammers card. When Billy Billions claims the same card, Ben has to battle Billy's high-tech drones which have hijacked the Rust Bucket!

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: During a stop at the superstore Shoppe, Ben and Gwen are transformed into babies by nanny-gone-nuts Nanny Nightmare, who will stop at nothing to reshape the world in the image of her day care.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Ben must turn alien to save the Hoover Dam from disaster, but when tough guy hero Tim Buktu swoops in to 'help', Ben must figure out if Tim is friend or foe.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max go on a tour of the impervious Fort Knox, but when Dr. Animo incites a hungry ani-mutate to attack the Fort, Ben must stop it before it gobbles up the nation's monetary standard!

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy, Lord Decibel, who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: Ben approaches Geezer Bob about doing a little yard work to earn spending money and accidentally draws the ire of Bob's gnome-neighbours: the tiny, terrifyingly tenacious Billy-Bob Goblins.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Ben stumbles into Dr. Animo's secret lab - now ruled by his superior mutants, the Alphas - and must help the lesser animals escape while stuck as 'Stinkfly'.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen's camping trip is interrupted by the emotionless Weatherheads. But a malfunctioning Omnitrix, firing out a mishmash of aliens, may not be the forecast for success.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Touring Yellowstone, Ben uncovers a plot by the fast and furious LaGrange to find treasure buried below the national park. But with Old Faithful's help, Overflow is able to douse LaGrange's dreams.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When a wizard cosplayer gets his hands on a real, magical wand at Comic Con, Ben enlists Gwen to help stop Hex from retrieving it.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max's trip to Niagara Falls is cut short by the horrid Hydromanders - creatures menacing them and their fellow tourists.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: While relaxing at a monastery with a no-noise policy, Ben can't keep quiet and accidentally awakens a dangerous dragon hidden in a secret chamber below the hallowed halls.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max stop by the graveyard set of Gwen's favourite TV show, The Unalivers. Before long, Ben discovers its lead, Michael Morningstar, is an energy vampire.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: Harry Potter learns that he is the orphaned son of two powerful wizards and possesses magical powers.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Prisoner Of Azkaban

programme.title: Top Chef S16 - EP 13
programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles of the competition. Judge Graham Elliot, who has a restaurant in Macau, introduces the Chefs to the local market full of fascinating ingredients and challenges them to a Quickfire highlighting unique Macanese proteins. Then, the chefs throw a party celebrating Chinese New Year.

programme.title: Top Chef S16 - EP 14
programme.desc: The day has come when the final four chefs must cook with the world's smelliest fruit durian. This infamous fruit is a delicacy in Macau, but will Padma and guest judge, James Beard Award winner Abe Conlon be able to stomach their creations for the season's last Quickfire? Then, the chefs get a tutorial in the traditional cuisine of Macau, a fusion of Chinese and Portuguese flavors, and are joined by their family members from back home.

programme.title: Top Chef S16 - EP 15
programme.desc: It's the final showdown and the top three chefs must create the best four course meal of their lives. And if the pressure isn't already high enough, Tom reveals in a twisted turn of events only two chefs will get the chance to serve their full menu. The internationally star-studded table of diners includes Deputy Editor of FOOD & WINE Magazine Melanie Hansche, acclaimed chefs Mitsuharu Tsumura, Alexander Smalls, Dan Hong, May Chow, and Alvin Leung, along with Tom, Padma, Nilou and Graham.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: When Chowder's love of thrice cream constantly disrupts work, Mung cooks up a way to break his sweet obsession.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: After Truffles feels like she's put on a little weight, she demands that the whole company go on a diet. It's a battle of wills to see if she can lose weight before they rest of them lose their minds.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: If Chowder can survive making a very complicated dish, he's on his way to becoming a chef.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Panini sets her love-struck eyes on Chowder, he tries every trick he can think of to convince her he's not her boyfriend.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Chowder learns that messing with Truffles' game night means certain doom.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Kimchi whisks one of Mung's smelliest dishes away to a romantic setting on top of the catering company.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: When Mung is forced to spend the day in Chef Certifrycation school, he butts heads with a fickle instructor.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: In order to cook the performing food Sing Beans, the gang has to stay up all night as the dish cooks.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Chowder is forced to swallow his new gum before Truffles finds out he didn't buy enough to share. Soon all of Marzipan City ends up in a very sticky situation.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Chowder discovers a lonely monster in the forest, the whole gang soon has to find a way to escape from their emotionally needy new 'friend'.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 12

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 13

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 14

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Chowder gives Gazpacho a hand in preparing for his big comedy debut. But Chowder's poor penmanship threatens to turn the situation from funny to failure.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When Mung and Ms. Endive unveil the same dish at Marzipan City's biggest food fair, it's an all out war to decide whose is better.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When a sour berry sends Chowder on a strange journey into his own mouth, he finds himself on a mission to save his taste buds from some tart invaders.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Truffles' bad temper causes Mung's fruit creatures to stop making juice, he locks her up with an ultimatum: make friends with them or never get out.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: Feeling Chowder's been spending too long in the kitchen, Mung forces him to play with the other kids. Beset by kisses and taunts, he tries to escape.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Truffles gives Mung the cold shoulder after he forgets their 450th wedding anniversary. With Mung too sad to cook, Chowder must take action.

programme.title: Chowder S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When Chowder accidentally puts Mung into a deep sleep, he and Shnitzel must try and wake him before Truffles finds out.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 1
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition's fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal - however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 2
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold's last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold's friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Built for Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions’ uncovers the blueprints behind the world’s biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC’s longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. programme.title: CNBC Sports - PGA TOUR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: Presidential Cycling Tour Of Turkiye 2026 - EP 1
programme.desc: As the only race in Türkiye categorized under the "ProSeries" on the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI) Europe Tour calendar, the 61st Presidential Cycling Tour of Türkiye includes the participation of world-famous professional teams and athletes.

programme.title: Bp Ultimate Rally Raid Portugal 2026
programme.desc: The bp Ultimate Rally-Raid Portugal, a competition for cars and motorbikes full of adrenaline, emotion and unforgettable moments, is once again a part of the World Rally Raid Championship. Organised by the ACP - Automóvel Club de Portugal, this time it occupies the 2nd position on the W2RC calendar, with the only stage being held on European territory, namely in Portugal and Spain.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: The Spirit of Yachting

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. programme.title: Samurai Drama Selections "Crossing of Heat Haze" Ep. 1 (New) (R)
programme.desc: Based on the popular period novel series by Saeki Yasuhide, this drama follows Sakazaki Iwane, a gifted swordsman known for his calm grace. Once a samurai of the Bungo Sekimae domain, he abandons his clan after a tragic incident and lives as a ronin in Edo. Portrayed by Yamamoto Koji, Iwane is a gentle and compassionate warrior who upholds justice, in a richly entertaining period series filled with swordplay, romance, human drama, and humor.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 25 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Slow Life at a Temple (R)

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-kun (R)
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character "Kaneo-kun" (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: News

programme.title: Exploring Factories
programme.desc: An entertainment program visiting small and large factories to discover the latest science, hidden artisanship, and enthusiastic people that support traditions of Japanese manufacture.

programme.title: Fun with Okinawa Dialects
programme.desc: Get familiar with Okinawa dialects by listening to folk tales and children's songs.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Week 5 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: News & Weather
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 16 (R)
programme.desc: Tasked with swaying Azai retainer Miyabe Keijun (Donpei), Tokichiro is confronted with an impossible demand: a child to be taken hostage. Childless himself, he attempts to offer the child of Tomo (Miyazawa Emma), only to provoke her fury and be forced to turn to Koichiro instead. Meanwhile, the defeated Azai Nagamasa and Asakura Yoshikage (Tsurumi Shingo) seek refuge at Enryakuji Temple, leading Oda Nobunaga to order the temple’s destruction if it refused to submit.

programme.title: PythagoraSwitch
programme.desc: There are various interesting laws and rules and philosophies hidden in our daily lives. This program introduces children to them and how to think.

programme.title: The Great Nature "Vanuatu" (R)
programme.desc: Experience marvelous nature that you have never seen before. This program introduces ultimate forms of ‘great nature’ including ground, ocean, and natural phenomena of the earth that existed from 4.6 billion years ago.

programme.title: Exquisite Railway Gourmet Trip: Kyushu
programme.desc: Actor colleagues Tokiwa Takako and Ishida Hikari take a one‑night, two‑day rail journey across Kyushu aboard the luxury sightseeing train "Sanju-Roku plus San _x000D__x000D_," the Sonic limited express, and the restaurant train "THE RAIL KITCHEN CHIKUGO." Along the way, they enjoy beautiful views and distinctive onboard cuisine, discovering the region through its food on a journey filled with flavor and charm.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery Special in Saitama (R)

Regaining momentum, Nobunaga renews his attack on the Azai and Asakura clans, forcing Azai Nagamasa into a desperate stand at Odani Castle. With the siege tightening, Koichiro and Tokichiro attempt to save Ichi.

Reporter Hiba Kikuno (Matsumoto Wakana) begins investigating and zeroes in on board member Kanbayashi Harumi (Suzuki Honami), who deftly deflects every inquiry. As Hiba pushes closer to the truth, the two women - each shaped by injustices in a male‑dominated society - find their convictions in direct conflict.

programme.title: Japan Delish 5min.

programme.desc: Matsumoto Myokei, a 'once-in-a-century' sculptor of Buddhist statues, is passing his skills onto his grandson Shukan - 80 years on from the atomic bomb attacks, Shukan sculpts a message of peace.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony

programme.title: Time-Lapse Journey
programme.desc: Mount Fuji, the tallest mountain in Japan, has many faces - see the beauty of these different Fujis through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Hosono Hitomi's botanically-themed ceramics are highly acclaimed and held in museum collections across the world - she talks about her intricate designs and unmatched technique.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Global warming leads to widespread famine - by 2100, it is predicted that yields of maize, soybeans and wheat may fall by 30 to 40 per cent. We examine the scientific data on this global issue.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Will Sparks Fly?: A young man sits in a teahouse with his older companion when a young woman catches his eye - from the way they're looking at each other, it's clear there's something between them.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Two drugs have been approved for their potential to slow the progression of Alzheimer's disease - we look at how they work and report on new findings suggesting a food-derived component may also help.

programme.title: Trailblazers

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 487
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: TAKE MY WORD FOR IT - EP 18
programme.desc: This drama centres around the experiences of members of the Police Negotiation Cadre (PNC), a volunteer unit of the Hong Kong police force specialising in negotiations with terrorist members, partakers of local violence, as well as individuals contemplating suicide.

programme.title: Holistic Way+Ninjiom - Themis & What's On Today - EP 25
programme.desc: High Court judge Yan Huizhi investigates a case involving a 14-year-old boy linked to a child's death. Discovering that he had repeatedly offended without punishment due to his age, she demotes herself to the juvenile court to help reform troubled youths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2798
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Try It? Really?
programme.desc: Host Kong Mei-yee travels to different places in Guangdong Province, where she teams up with two partners at each stop to test various dishes as customers to see if they're good value for money, and exploring whether various attractions are worth visiting.

programme.title: Romance of A Twin Flower - EP 29
programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.title: Big City Shop 2026
programme.desc: Big City Shop introduces viewers to the latest products on fashion, skin care, make-up, health care, baby care and much more!

programme.title: Happy Old Buddies
programme.desc: This show brings on doctors and Chinese medicine practitioners to discuss diseases that the elderly should pay attention to, and provide prevention and treatment methods.

programme.title: Gourmet Express
programme.desc: Hong Kong is home to gourmet food from all over the world. Our food anchors and hosts keep up with the latest foodie information and offers, gaining an in-depth understanding of the stories behind the taste.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong
programme.desc: Good Morning Hong Kong brings you the latest news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs that matter to you.

programme.title: Cooking Beauties
programme.desc: Edwin Siu, Bob Lam and Owen Cheung host the third season of Cooking Beauties! A group of female celebrities must prepare a designated dish, maintaining an air of mystery while the male guests try to guess the beauties' identities.

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Life in Hong Kong is vibrant and diverse. This lifestyle show combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: This children's programme encourages children to ask questions, express themselves, and move towards their goals!

programme.title: On-Lie Game - EP 17
programme.desc: Senior Inspector Sunny of the Cyber Security and Technology Crime InvestigationDepartment is joined by a rookie inspector Denise in cracking down online fraudcases. Going through thick and thin, the duo develop mutual feelings.

programme.title: Food Mister
programme.desc: Have you wondered what fictional dishes in the literature would taste like? We invite a star chef to find inspiration from TV series, video games, cartoons and literary classics, discovering some of the special delicacies mentioned in them, and recreating these seemingly unreal dishes.

programme.title: When Science Meets Magic
programme.desc: Magic offers a wondrous experience beyond understanding, but could it simply be a scientific phenomenon? Louis Yan, along with Crystal Fung and Eileen Ho, put on captivating performances, with "star students" carefully analysing them, choosing between magic and science!

programme.title: ChatSAT
programme.desc: Teenagers are keen on trends. Stepping into the era of technology, they are particularly interested in emerging electronic products and popular media. Our hosts collect the newest information from all over the world, sharing their discoveries with viewers each week.

programme.title: Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4
programme.desc: The fourth season of this popular cross-regional music talent contest designed for adults aged 35 and above expands global recruitment, welcoming contestants from Hong Kong, Macao, mainland China, North America, Singapore, Malaysia and Australia.

programme.title: Star Weekly

programme.title: Music Money Monster
programme.desc: Music Money Monster challenges ordinary people and celebrities to battle through live singing stages judged solely by a real‑time AI pitch and beat analyzer, turning flawless intonation into instant cash rewards for players and viewers!

programme.title: J Music 2026
programme.desc: In each episode, popular singers are invited as guests, and they select their favourite works, performing with the live band to share their music with fans.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Gourmet Express Weekly
programme.desc: Our food anchors and hosts stay up-to-date with the latest culinary trends, gathering information on top-rated restaurants from various platforms. The hosts personally sample the food and provide honest reviews to keep you informed about delicious and affordable dining options.

programme.title: Christian's Choice
programme.desc: Host Christian Yang curates a selection of authentic, independently-owned restaurants, exploring the hidden stories behind these establishments, tasting their extraordinary signature dishes, and appreciating the fighting spirit of Hong Kong's culinary culture.

programme.title: News Magazine 2026
programme.desc: A weekly programme covering notable news stories from Hong Kong and around the world. It focuses on social issues that matter most to Hong Kong residents and invites people from various sectors to discuss and analyse the underlying causes and developments.

programme.title: ChatSAT
programme.desc: Teenagers are keen on trends. Stepping into the era of technology, they are particularly interested in emerging electronic products and popular media. Our hosts collect the newest information from all over the world, sharing their discoveries with viewers each week.

programme.title: Global Citizens
programme.desc: In this age of globalisation, everyone's lives are interconnected. This eight-episode programme invites eight foreign residents of Hong Kong to share the cultural characteristics of their countries, such as Chile, Ukraine, Japan, Pakistan, the United States and more.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong
programme.desc: Good Morning Hong Kong brings you the latest news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs that matter to you.

programme.title: Super Trio Returns
programme.desc: The Super Trio Series is celebrating its 25th anniversary, and "Super Trio Master" Eric Tsang announces the show's triumphant return! Each episode will feature a host of hilarious guest friends, participating in numerous laugh-out-loud games to deliver endless entertainment.

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Life in Hong Kong is vibrant and diverse. This lifestyle show combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: This children's programme encourages children to ask questions, express themselves, and move towards their goals!

programme.title: On-Lie Game - EP 19
programme.desc: Senior Inspector Sunny of the Cyber Security and Technology Crime InvestigationDepartment is joined by a rookie inspector Denise in cracking down online fraudcases. Going through thick and thin, the duo develop mutual feelings.

programme.title: Cantopop At 50
programme.desc: Cantopop At 50 invites original singers or established singers to reinterpret popular classics that span multiple generations, bringing high-quality music for the fans' enjoyment.

programme.title: The Lion Roars
programme.desc: During the Song Dynasty, there was a beautiful woman named Liu Yue'e with a fiery temper. Despite years of arranged marriages, she remained unmarried. One day, she met the dashing poet Chen Jichang and was deeply impressed by his talent.

programme.title: Vital Lifeline
programme.desc: The body of the urban dweller is prone to problems. Vital Lifeline deconstructs your health. Each episode invites medical experts to explain the causes of various diseases, as well as physical therapists and sports therapists to teach appropriate exercises.

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021

programme.title: News At 18:30
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every evening at 6:30pm.

programme.title: Sunday Report 2026
programme.desc: Sunday Report focuses on prominent newsmakers and in-depth feature reports. It explores socially relevant issues through a human-centered perspective, interviewing people from various walks of life and sectors to provide thorough coverage of topics the public cares about.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4
programme.desc: The fourth season of this popular cross-regional music talent contest designed for adults aged 35 and above expands global recruitment, welcoming contestants from Hong Kong, Macao, mainland China, North America, Singapore, Malaysia and Australia.

programme.title: Star Weekly
programme.desc: Star Weekly invites celebrities and well-known figures from different sectors to chat with our hosts, sharing their latest work plans and discussing special topics related to films, television and concerts, focusing especially on people and events that online users are keenly following.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, keeping you informed about important events as well as updates in the world of sports.

programme.title: Finance Magazine 2026
programme.desc: Finance Magazine closely follows the market, Hong Kong stocks trends and the property market situation. Through interviews with industry insiders and market analysis, it explores the hot topics in Hong Kong and international finance.

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven: Resurrection - EP 6
programme.desc: Continuing the plot from the previous season of ‘The Escape of the Seven’, the sequel focuses on a man who dreams of becoming a king in a castle built on fake news and the counterattack of seven people escaping evil.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 6
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2202
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 10
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] With Tak-kiu’s help, Yi-ka joins the Zodiac board. Yat-yin suspects Tak-kiu has some ulterior motive. Interpol further confirms Chun-to’s plane crash was due to human factors. Zodiac admits a girl patient with severe dyskeratosis congenita. Yat-yin insists on performing a high-risk simultaneous live donor lung and liver transplant on the child patient.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 22
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2202
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 15
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 874
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 30
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 35
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 36
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yat-yin manages to join the board. Moreover, Nosama Inc Chair Fong Yan becomes a new director. And Fong Yan blatantly confronts Yat-yin. Yat-yin again requests Yi-ka and Lai-suet to join the board. But Yi-ka simply declines. There’s some news about medical malpractice at Zodiac HK Hospital, and Lai-suet’s younger brother Chan Yu-chak is involved.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The medical malpractice issues are getting out of hand. And Deputy Chief Hospital Manager Ying-kit is implicated due to vested interests. To win Ying-kit’s vote at the board, Fong Yan covertly engages in manipulative tactics. Based on her understanding of Yi-ka’s righteousness, Yat-yin releases some story so as to let Yi-ka get involved in the medical malpractice issues.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Kin-pong tells Kai-ching Wing-sing is the culprit behind the infectious disease incident. Operations are deferred as Zodiac surgeons are placed in quarantine. And the situation abruptly becomes chaotic! Yat-yin divides her time between operating theaters as she tries her best to save patients.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yat-yin, Ying-kit and their team are going to attend a conference. They are abducted on the way. Actually, at Wing-sing’s suggestion, Ying-wai orders Yat-yin and her chums to be abducted and taken to a cargo ship that is heading to the high seas, and they are going to perform liver transplant surgery on his father.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 10
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] With Tak-kiu’s help, Yi-ka joins the Zodiac board. Yat-yin suspects Tak-kiu has some ulterior motive. Interpol further confirms Chun-to’s plane crash was due to human factors. Zodiac admits a girl patient with severe dyskeratosis congenita. Yat-yin insists on performing a high-risk simultaneous live donor lung and liver transplant on the child patient.

programme.title: Honour - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 14
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 39
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 40
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 7

programme.title: Honour - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 16
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 7
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 30
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Speakers Of Law - EP 15
programme.desc: Kam Bing-shun (Kenneth Ma) is a top law student. However, due to a miscarriage of justice, he decides to follow the path to becoming a Legal Executive. By means of his diplomatic and tactful approach, Bing-shun gradually builds his own brand, Adviser Kam. The law firm where Adviser Kam works abruptly faces the prospect of closing down. He uses networking to defuse the situation. He is also invited by lawyers Tin Yau-ka (Lam Ha Mei) and Yu Kwok-tung (Stephen Wong) to join their team.

programme.title: Succession War - EP 21
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Revolving Doors of Vengeance - EP 20
programme.desc: Hotel tycoon WONG YUK TING’s family starts a legacy dispute immediately after his death. The third son KAI KIT (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) leaves home. His mother is soon forced to leave by his half brothers. Furthermore, KIT finds out that TING has transferred his hotel shares to a stranger KO FUNG, MARTIN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE). _x000D__x000D_ FUNG comes for revenge. He swears to get hold of the whole hotel.

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 1
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 5
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 30
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 1
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. programme.title: The Conquest - EP 23
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.
